# handles

**Instance Property**

The handles of all remote members who receive an invite  to join the conversation.

## Declaration

```swift
final let handles: [Handle]
```

## Accessing action attributes

- **isVideo**: A value that specifies if the conversation contains a video stream.

items.description: A value that specifies if the conversation contains a video stream.
